     The Numbers Business Report

Saw (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $55,968,727Details
International Box Office $47,911,300
Worldwide Box Office $103,880,027
Further financial details...

Synopsis

With a dead body lying between them, two men wake up in the secure lair of a serial killer who's been nicknamed "Jigsaw". The men must follow various rules and objectives if they wish to survive and win the deadly game set for them.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$18,276,468 (32.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.06 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:53.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$1,200,000 (worldwide box office is 86.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,315 opening theaters/2,467 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $101,642,012

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 29th, 2004 (Wide) by Lionsgate
October 31st, 2014 (Limited) by Lionsgate, released as Saw - 10th Anniversary
October 20th, 2024 (Special Engagement) by Fathom Events, released as Saw UNRATED
International Releases: October 29th, 2004 (Wide), released as Testere (Turkey)
December 3rd, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
November 1st, 2024 (Limited) (4K Restoration) (United Kingdom)
May 30th, 2025 (Limited), released as Testere (Turkey)
Video Release: February 15th, 2005 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong grisly violence and language
Running Time: 103 minutes
Franchise: Saw
Plot point: Escape, Non-Chronological, Serial Killer, Torture Porn, Trapped
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
